title: The evolutionary history of colour polymorphism in Ischnura damselflies (Odonata: Coenagrionidae)
author: Rosa Ana Sánchez Guillén
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by
description:
Evol analysis zip_  

 1. color2 

 2. data.full 

 3. mcc-tree 

 4. script 

  Supplementaty File 1  

 1. DNA extraction and DNA Extraction 

 2. Table S1.  Sequence references and GenBank accession numbers 

 3. Table S2. Species distribution. Biogeographical Regions 

 4. Figure S1. Ischnura phylogeny by using Maximum likelihood inference. 

 5. Figure S2. Correlation between female-limited colour polymorphism and mating system. 

 6. Figure S3.  Female-limited colour polymorphism depend on mating system. 

 7. Figure S4.  Mating system depends on female-limited colour polymorphism. 

  Supplementary File 2   Aligned sequences (nexus format). 

  Supplementary File 3   Sampled posterior tree used for  the analyses.
